_doc: Project-specific golden rules for Hawky. These override global rules by ID. Hawky is a security testing tool that needs test fixtures with intentional security anti-patterns.

rules.message: Math.random() is not cryptographically secure. Use crypto.randomBytes() or crypto.randomUUID() for tokens/IDs.
rules.fix: Replace with: import { randomUUID } from 'crypto'; const id = randomUUID();

rules.message: SQL string interpolation detected - use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.
rules.fix: Use parameterized queries: db.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1', [userId]) instead of template literals.

rules.message: dangerouslySetInnerHTML with variable data is an XSS risk. Sanitize input first.
rules.fix: Use DOMPurify: import DOMPurify from 'dompurify'; dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: DOMPurify.sanitize(content) }}
